requirement_topic.en: EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (ZS/IEC CISPR 14 series under ZABS, ZICTA for radio modules)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（ZABS下的ZS/IEC CISPR 14系列，无线电模块由ZICTA管理）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（ZABS下的ZS/IEC CISPR 14系列，無線電模組由ZICTA管理）

summary.en: Zambia does not operate an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive. For household appliances, electromagnetic compatibility is addressed through the Zambian Standard (ZS) adoption of the international CISPR/IEC EMC standards — primarily the ZS adoption of CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — verified, where applicable, as part of ZABS conformity assessment for regulated electrical products. Separately, any refrigerator with wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart-home module) requires type approval of the radio module by the Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA) before importation and use; ZICTA governs the radio-spectrum and equipment-approval aspects, while ZABS governs the appliance-level safety/EMC conformity. There is no single CE-equivalent mark; ZABS verification plus, for connected models, ZICTA type approval are the applicable controls.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不设欧盟式横向电磁兼容指令。家用器具的电磁兼容通过赞比亚标准（ZS）采纳国际CISPR/IEC电磁兼容标准来处理——主要为家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）的ZS采纳版，并在适用时作为受监管电气产品ZABS合格评定的一部分予以核验。此外，任何具无线连接功能（Wi-Fi/蓝牙智能家居模块）的电冰箱，须在进口和使用前由赞比亚信息通信技术管理局（ZICTA）对无线电模块进行型号核准；ZICTA管理无线电频谱和设备核准，ZABS管理器具层面的安全/电磁兼容合格评定。不存在单一等同CE的标识；ZABS核验加上（联网型号的）ZICTA型号核准为适用管控。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不設歐盟式橫向電磁相容指令。家用器具的電磁相容通過尚比亞標準（ZS）採納國際CISPR/IEC電磁相容標準來處理——主要為家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）的ZS採納版，並在適用時作為受監管電氣產品ZABS合格評定的一部分予以核驗。此外，任何具無線連接功能（Wi-Fi/藍牙智慧家居模組）的電冰箱，須在進口和使用前由尚比亞資訊通信技術管理局（ZICTA）對無線電模組進行型號核准；ZICTA管理無線電頻譜和設備核准，ZABS管理器具層面的安全/電磁相容合格評定。不存在單一等同CE的標識；ZABS核驗加上（聯網型號的）ZICTA型號核准為適用管控。

standards_or_laws: ZS CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (Zambian adoption of CISPR 14-1)
ZS CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (Zambian adoption of CISPR 14-2)
ZICTA type approval — radio equipment / connected modules (Information and Communication Technologies Act; required for Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart models)
ZABS conformity-assessment / import-inspection requirements for regulated electrical products

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under the CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA. For wireless functions, China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval of the radio module. Because both China and Zambia derive their appliance EMC standards from the same CISPR base, the technical content overlaps substantially; however, Chinese CCC/SRRC documentation does not automatically satisfy ZABS conformity assessment or ZICTA type approval.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），谐波发射方面适用GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020），在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA执行。无线功能方面，中国要求由国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）对无线电模块进行型号核准。由于中赞两国的器具电磁兼容标准同源于CISPR，技术内容大量重叠；但中国CCC/SRRC文件不自动满足ZABS合格评定或ZICTA型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），諧波發射方面適用GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020），在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA執行。無線功能方面，中國要求由國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）對無線電模組進行型號核准。由於中尚兩國的器具電磁相容標準同源於CISPR，技術內容大量重疊；但中國CCC/SRRC文件不自動滿足ZABS合格評定或ZICTA型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
SRRC type approval — radio module approval for wireless functions (State Radio Regulation of China)

gap.en: Two distinct paths must be addressed: (1) Appliance EMC — because the Zambian ZS standard and Chinese GB 4343.1 both derive from CISPR 14, the underlying emission/immunity test data has high technical overlap; the practical gap is presenting acceptable evidence (an IEC/CISPR-based CB or accredited-lab report is preferable to a CCC certificate referencing GB) as part of ZABS conformity assessment. (2) Radio module — for smart/connected refrigerators, Chinese SRRC approval does NOT carry over; the Wi-Fi/Bluetooth module must obtain ZICTA type approval before importation. For a standard (non-connected) refrigerator, only the appliance-level EMC via ZABS applies and there is no ZICTA step. Markings/documentation should be in English. Zambia has no EU-style standalone EMC mark; conformity is demonstrated through ZABS verification (and ZICTA approval for radio).
gap.zh: 须处理两条不同路径：（1）器具电磁兼容——由于赞比亚ZS标准与中国GB 4343.1同源于CISPR 14，底层发射/抗扰度检测数据技术重叠度高；实际差距在于作为ZABS合格评定一部分提交可接受的证据（基于IEC/CISPR的CB或认可实验室报告优于引用GB的CCC证书）。（2）无线电模块——对智能/联网电冰箱，中国SRRC核准不可沿用；Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块须在进口前取得ZICTA型号核准。对标准（非联网）电冰箱，仅适用经ZABS的器具层面电磁兼容，无ZICTA环节。标识/文件宜为英文。赞比亚无欧盟式独立电磁兼容标识；合规通过ZABS核验（及无线电的ZICTA核准）证明。
gap.zht: 須處理兩條不同路徑：（1）器具電磁相容——由於尚比亞ZS標準與中國GB 4343.1同源於CISPR 14，底層發射/抗擾度檢測數據技術重疊度高；實際差距在於作為ZABS合格評定一部分提交可接受的證據（基於IEC/CISPR的CB或認可實驗室報告優於引用GB的CCC證書）。（2）無線電模組——對智慧/聯網電冰箱，中國SRRC核准不可沿用；Wi-Fi/藍牙模組須在進口前取得ZICTA型號核准。對標準（非聯網）電冰箱，僅適用經ZABS的器具層面電磁相容，無ZICTA環節。標識/文件宜為英文。尚比亞無歐盟式獨立電磁相容標識；合規通過ZABS核驗（及無線電的ZICTA核准）證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory via ZABS conformity assessment for appliance EMC (ZS/CISPR 14 series); ZICTA type approval mandatory for the radio module of connected/smart refrigerators; no standalone EU-style EMC mark exists in Zambia
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 mandatory (GB) under CCC; GB/T 4343.2-2020 recommended (GB/T); SRRC approval required for radio modules — all enforced domestically by SAMR/CNCA/SRRC

source.publisher: Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive; appliance EMC is handled through ZS/CISPR 14 standards under ZABS conformity assessment, and connected models additionally need ZICTA type approval of the radio module. Chinese GB 4343.1 (CISPR-derived) test data overlaps technically but is not automatically accepted; an IEC/CISPR-based accredited report is preferable. SRRC approval does not substitute for ZICTA. Confirm current ZABS and ZICTA requirements with a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚不设欧盟式横向电磁兼容指令；器具电磁兼容通过ZABS合格评定下的ZS/CISPR 14标准处理，联网型号另需ZICTA对无线电模块的型号核准。中国GB 4343.1（源自CISPR）检测数据技术上重叠但不被自动接受；基于IEC/CISPR的认可报告更佳。SRRC核准不能替代ZICTA。请向合格顾问核实现行ZABS与ZICTA要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞不設歐盟式橫向電磁相容指令；器具電磁相容通過ZABS合格評定下的ZS/CISPR 14標準處理，聯網型號另需ZICTA對無線電模組的型號核准。中國GB 4343.1（源自CISPR）檢測數據技術上重疊但不被自動接受；基於IEC/CISPR的認可報告更佳。SRRC核准不能替代ZICTA。請向合格顧問核實現行ZABS與ZICTA要求。
